You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 23.84 (commit: afd37fc8).

## Issue to Resolve

[Prompts] Regression in Prompts responses list pagination
### Expected behavior
When tapping the `View all responses` and scrolling the response list I should be able to get an infinite scroll with proper pagination until I see all responses. New posts are added to the end of the list when loaded. (it was working on version 23.6 and below)

### Actual behavior
When tapping the `View all responses` and scrolling the response list I see the new responses loading once or twice but then no more posts are loaded. Posts shift places when a load happens. (this behavior started on version 23.7)

### Steps to reproduce the behavior
On any Jetpack app build of version 23.7 or later do the following:
1. Install and log into the Jetpack app
2. Make sure the `dailyprompt-XXXX` tag for the current day IS NOT FOLLOWED
3. Go to the dashboard
4. Tap `View all responses` on the Prompts card
5. Scroll the prompt tag responses list for a while
6. **Verify** pagination is not working properly (posts are shifting around)
7. **Verify** pagination stops loading new posts at some point

##### Tested on Emulator, Android 14, JPAndroid 23.7 and later

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `RELEASE-NOTES.txt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/bloggingprompts/BloggingPromptsPostTagProvider.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

20→@AndroidEntryPoint
21→class BloggingPromptsListActivity : LocaleAwareActivity() {
22→    private val viewModel: BloggingPromptsListViewModel by viewModels()
23→
24→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
25→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
26→        setContent {
27→            AppTheme {
28→                val uiState by viewModel.uiStateFlow.collectAsState()
29→                BloggingPromptsListScreen(
30→                    uiState,
31→                    { onBackPressedDispatcher.onBackPressed() },
32→                    viewModel::onPromptListItemClicked
33→                )
34→            }
35→        }
36→        observeActions()
37→    }
38→
39→    /**
40→     * Since we're declaring that this Activity handles orientation changes by itself in the
41→     * AndroidManifest.xml (android:configChanges="orientation|screenSize") Activity#onResume will not be called
42→     * when the screen orientation changes. This was done on purpose to avoid loading the list of prompts again
43→     * unnecessarily and also to avoid tracking of the screen shown analytics event again while in the same screen.
44→     */
45→    override fun onResume() {
46→        super.onResume()
47→        viewModel.onScreenShown()
48→    }
49→
50→    private fun observeActions() {
51→        viewModel.actionEvents.onEach(this::handleActionEvents).launchIn(lifecycleScope)
52→    }
53→
54→    private fun handleActionEvents(actionEvent: BloggingPromptsListViewModel.ActionEvent) {
55→        when (actionEvent) {
56→            is BloggingPromptsListViewModel.ActionEvent.OpenEditor -> {
57→                startActivity(
58→                    ActivityLauncher.createOpenEditorWithBloggingPromptIntent(
59→                        this, actionEvent.bloggingPromptId, PostUtils.EntryPoint.BLOGGING_PROMPTS_LIST
60→                    )
61→                )
62→            }
63→        }
64→    }
65→
66→    companion object {
67→        @JvmStatic
68→        fun createIntent(context: Context) = Intent(context, BloggingPromptsListActivity::class.java)
69→    }
70→}

216→    @Suppress("DEPRECATION", "OVERRIDE_DEPRECATION", "ReturnCount", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod")
217→    override fun onActivityResult(requestCode: Int, resultCode: Int, data: Intent?) {
218→        super.onActivityResult(requestCode, resultCode, data)
219→        if (data == null) {
220→            return
221→        }
222→        when (requestCode) {
223→            RequestCodes.DO_LOGIN -> if (resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
224→                viewModel.handleSuccessfulLoginResult()
225→            }
226→            RequestCodes.SITE_ICON_PICKER -> {
227→                if (resultCode != Activity.RESULT_OK) {
228→                    return
229→                }
230→                when {
231→                    data.hasExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_ID) -> {
232→                        val mediaId = data.getLongExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_ID, 0)
233→                        viewModel.handleSelectedSiteIcon(mediaId)
234→                    }
235→                    data.hasExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_URIS) -> {
236→                        val mediaUriStringsArray = data.getStringArrayExtra(
237→                            MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_URIS
238→                        ) ?: return
239→
240→                        val source =
241→                            org.wordpress.android.ui.photopicker.PhotoPickerActivity.PhotoPickerMediaSource.fromString(
242→                                data.getStringExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_SOURCE)
243→                            )
244→                        val iconUrl = mediaUriStringsArray.getOrNull(0) ?: return
245→                        viewModel.handleTakenSiteIcon(iconUrl, source)
246→                    }
247→                    else -> {
248→                        AppLog.e(
249→                            AppLog.T.UTILS,
250→                            "Can't resolve picked or captured image"
251→                        )
252→                    }
253→                }
254→            }
255→            RequestCodes.STORIES_PHOTO_PICKER,
256→            RequestCodes.PHOTO_PICKER -> if (resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
257→                viewModel.handleStoriesPhotoPickerResult(data)
258→            }
259→            UCrop.REQUEST_CROP -> {
260→                if (resultCode == UCrop.RESULT_ERROR) {
261→                    AppLog.e(
262→                        AppLog.T.MAIN,
263→                        "Image cropping failed!",
264→                        UCrop.getError(data)
265→                    )
266→                }
267→                viewModel.handleCropResult(UCrop.getOutput(data), resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK)
268→            }
269→            RequestCodes.DOMAIN_REGISTRATION -> if (resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
270→                viewModel.handleSuccessfulDomainRegistrationResult(
271→                    data.getStringExtra(DomainRegistrationActivity.RESULT_REGISTERED_DOMAIN_EMAIL)
272→                )
273→            }
274→            RequestCodes.LOGIN_EPILOGUE,
275→            RequestCodes.CREATE_SITE -> {
276→                val isNewSite = requestCode == RequestCodes.CREATE_SITE ||
277→                        data.getBooleanExtra(LoginEpilogueActivity.KEY_SITE_CREATED_FROM_LOGIN_EPILOGUE, false)
278→                viewModel.performFirstStepAfterSiteCreation(
279→                    data.getBooleanExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, false),
280→                    isNewSite = isNewSite
281→                )
282→            }
283→            RequestCodes.SITE_PICKER -> {
284→                if (data.getIntExtra(WPMainActivity.ARG_CREATE_SITE, 0) == RequestCodes.CREATE_SITE) {
285→                    viewModel.performFirstStepAfterSiteCreation(
286→                        data.getBooleanExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, false),
287→                        isNewSite = true
288→                    )
289→                } else {
290→                    viewModel.onSitePicked()
291→                }
292→            }
293→            RequestCodes.EDIT_LANDING_PAGE -> {
294→                viewModel.checkAndStartQuickStart(
295→                    data.getBooleanExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, false),
296→                    isNewSite = data.getBooleanExtra(
297→                        EditPostActivity.EXTRA_IS_LANDING_EDITOR_OPENED_FOR_NEW_SITE, false
298→                    )
299→                )
300→            }
301→        }
302→    }

614→    fun handleNavigationAction(action: SiteNavigationAction) = when (action) {
615→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMeScreen -> ActivityLauncher.viewMeActivityForResult(activity)
616→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSitePicker -> ActivityLauncher.showSitePickerForResult(activity, action.site)
617→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSite -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentSite(activity, action.site, true)
618→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMediaPicker ->
619→            mediaPickerLauncher.showSiteIconPicker(this@MySiteFragment, action.site)
620→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenCropActivity -> startCropActivity(action.imageUri)
621→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenActivityLog -> ActivityLauncher.viewActivityLogList(activity, action.site)
622→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenBackup -> ActivityLauncher.viewBackupList(activity, action.site)
623→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenScan -> ActivityLauncher.viewScan(activity, action.site)
624→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPlan -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogPlans(activity, action.site)
625→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPosts -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPosts(requireActivity(), action.site)
626→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPages -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPages(requireActivity(), action.site)
627→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenHomepage -> ActivityLauncher.editLandingPageForResult(
628→            this,
629→            action.site,
630→            action.homepageLocalId,
631→            action.isNewSite
632→        )
633→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenAdmin -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogAdmin(activity, action.site)
634→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPeople -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPeople(activity, action.site)
635→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSharing -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogSharing(activity, action.site)
636→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSiteSettings -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogSettingsForResult(activity, action.site)
637→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenThemes -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogThemes(activity, action.site)
638→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPlugins -> ActivityLauncher.viewPluginBrowser(activity, action.site)
639→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMedia -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogMedia(activity, action.site)
640→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMore -> activityNavigator.openUnifiedMySiteMenu(
641→            requireActivity(),
642→            action.quickStartEvent
643→        )
644→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenUnifiedComments -> ActivityLauncher.viewUnifiedComments(activity, action.site)
645→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenStats -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogStats(activity, action.site)
646→        is SiteNavigationAction.ConnectJetpackForStats ->
647→            ActivityLauncher.viewConnectJetpackForStats(activity, action.site)
648→        is SiteNavigationAction.StartWPComLoginForJetpackStats ->
649→            ActivityLauncher.loginForJetpackStats(this@MySiteFragment)
650→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenStories -> ActivityLauncher.viewStories(activity, action.site, action.event)
651→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewStory ->
652→            ActivityLauncher.addNewStoryForResult(activity, action.site, action.source)
653→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewStoryWithMediaIds -> ActivityLauncher.addNewStoryWithMediaIdsForResult(
654→            activity,
655→            action.site,
656→            action.source,
657→            action.mediaIds.toLongArray()
658→        )
659→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewStoryWithMediaUris -> ActivityLauncher.addNewStoryWithMediaUrisForResult(
660→            activity,
661→            action.site,
662→            action.source,
663→            action.mediaUris.toTypedArray()
664→        )
665→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDomains -> ActivityLauncher.viewDomainsDashboardActivity(
666→            activity,
667→            action.site
668→        )
669→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDomainRegistration -> ActivityLauncher.viewDomainRegistrationActivityForResult(
670→            activity,
671→            action.site,
672→            DomainRegistrationActivity.DomainRegistrationPurpose.CTA_DOMAIN_CREDIT_REDEMPTION
673→        )
674→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenFreeDomainSearch ->

681→            this,

686→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewSite -> SitePickerActivity.addSite(activity, action.hasAccessToken, action.source)
687→        is SiteNavigationAction.ShowQuickStartDialog -> showQuickStartDialog(
688→            action.title,
689→            action.message,
690→            action.positiveButtonLabel,
691→            action.negativeButtonLabel,
692→            action.isNewSite

695→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDraftsPosts ->

content.text:
The issue was caused by the `ReaderTag` created in `BloggingPromptsPostTagProvider` lacking an API endpoint when the tag was not already followed by the user.

When `ReaderTag.endpoint` is missing or doesn't match the expected pattern for a tag topic (containing `/read/tags/`), `ReaderTag.isTagTopic()` returns `false`. This caused `ReaderPostListFragment` (and underlying `ReaderPostTable`) to default to sorting and paging posts by `date_published` instead of `date_tagged`.

Tag streams (`/read/tags/[slug]/posts`) are typically returned by the API sorted by the date the post was tagged. When the local pagination logic used `date_published` for the `before` parameter in subsequent requests, it created inconsistencies with the server's sort order, leading to posts shifting around or pagination stopping prematurely (as described in the issue).

The fix involves explicitly setting the endpoint on the `ReaderTag` object in `BloggingPromptsPostTagProvider` if it is missing. This ensures `isTagTopic()` returns `true`, enabling `ReaderPostTable` to use the correct `date_tagged` column for pagination, restoring infinite scroll functionality.

**Changes:**
- Modified `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/bloggingprompts/BloggingPromptsPostTagProvider.kt` to populate the `ReaderTag.endpoint` with `/read/tags/[slug]/posts` when creating a tag for a blogging prompt.

```kotlin
    fun promptIdSearchReaderTag(
        tagUrl: String
    ): ReaderTag {
        val tagSlug = promptIdTag(tagUrl)
        val tag = readerUtilsWrapper.getTagFromTagName(
            tagSlug,
            ReaderTagType.FOLLOWED,
        )
        if (tag.endpoint.isNullOrEmpty()) {
            val sanitizedSlug = ReaderUtils.sanitizeWithDashes(tagSlug)
            tag.endpoint = "/read/tags/$sanitizedSlug/posts"
        }
        return tag
    }
```

216→    @Suppress("DEPRECATION", "OVERRIDE_DEPRECATION", "ReturnCount", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod")
217→    override fun onActivityResult(requestCode: Int, resultCode: Int, data: Intent?) {
218→        super.onActivityResult(requestCode, resultCode, data)
219→        if (data == null) {
220→            return
221→        }
222→        when (requestCode) {
223→            RequestCodes.DO_LOGIN -> if (resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
224→                viewModel.handleSuccessfulLoginResult()
225→            }
226→            RequestCodes.SITE_ICON_PICKER -> {
227→                if (resultCode != Activity.RESULT_OK) {
228→                    return
229→                }
230→                when {
231→                    data.hasExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_ID) -> {
232→                        val mediaId = data.getLongExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_ID, 0)
233→                        viewModel.handleSelectedSiteIcon(mediaId)
234→                    }
235→                    data.hasExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_URIS) -> {
236→                        val mediaUriStringsArray = data.getStringArrayExtra(
237→                            MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_URIS
238→                        ) ?: return
239→
240→                        val source =
241→                            org.wordpress.android.ui.photopicker.PhotoPickerActivity.PhotoPickerMediaSource.fromString(
242→                                data.getStringExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_SOURCE)
243→                            )
244→                        val iconUrl = mediaUriStringsArray.getOrNull(0) ?: return
245→                        viewModel.handleTakenSiteIcon(iconUrl, source)
246→                    }
247→                    else -> {
248→                        AppLog.e(
249→                            AppLog.T.UTILS,
250→                            "Can't resolve picked or captured image"
251→                        )
252→                    }
253→                }
254→            }
255→            RequestCodes.STORIES_PHOTO_PICKER,
256→            RequestCodes.PHOTO_PICKER -> if (resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
257→                viewModel.handleStoriesPhotoPickerResult(data)
258→            }
259→            UCrop.REQUEST_CROP -> {
260→                if (resultCode == UCrop.RESULT_ERROR) {
261→                    AppLog.e(
262→                        AppLog.T.MAIN,
263→                        "Image cropping failed!",
264→                        UCrop.getError(data)
265→                    )
266→                }
267→                viewModel.handleCropResult(UCrop.getOutput(data), resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK)
268→            }
269→            RequestCodes.DOMAIN_REGISTRATION -> if (resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
270→                viewModel.handleSuccessfulDomainRegistrationResult(
271→                    data.getStringExtra(DomainRegistrationActivity.RESULT_REGISTERED_DOMAIN_EMAIL)
272→                )
273→            }
274→            RequestCodes.LOGIN_EPILOGUE,
275→            RequestCodes.CREATE_SITE -> {
276→                val isNewSite = requestCode == RequestCodes.CREATE_SITE ||
277→                        data.getBooleanExtra(LoginEpilogueActivity.KEY_SITE_CREATED_FROM_LOGIN_EPILOGUE, false)
278→                viewModel.performFirstStepAfterSiteCreation(
279→                    data.getBooleanExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, false),
280→                    isNewSite = isNewSite
281→                )
282→            }
283→            RequestCodes.SITE_PICKER -> {
284→                if (data.getIntExtra(WPMainActivity.ARG_CREATE_SITE, 0) == RequestCodes.CREATE_SITE) {
285→                    viewModel.performFirstStepAfterSiteCreation(
286→                        data.getBooleanExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, false),
287→                        isNewSite = true
288→                    )
289→                } else {
290→                    viewModel.onSitePicked()
291→                }
292→            }
293→            RequestCodes.EDIT_LANDING_PAGE -> {
294→                viewModel.checkAndStartQuickStart(
295→                    data.getBooleanExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, false),
296→                    isNewSite = data.getBooleanExtra(
297→                        EditPostActivity.EXTRA_IS_LANDING_EDITOR_OPENED_FOR_NEW_SITE, false
298→                    )
299→                )
300→            }
301→        }
302→    }

543→    private fun MySiteInfoHeaderCardBinding.loadMySiteDetails(siteInfoHeader: SiteInfoHeaderCard) {

545→        if (siteInfoHeader.iconState is IconState.Visible) {
546→            mySiteBlavatar.visibility = View.VISIBLE
547→            imageManager.load(mySiteBlavatar, BLAVATAR, siteInfoHeader.iconState.url ?: "")
548→            mySiteIconProgress.visibility = View.GONE
549→            mySiteBlavatar.setOnClickListener { siteInfoHeader.onIconClick.click() }
550→        } else if (siteInfoHeader.iconState is IconState.Progress) {
551→            mySiteBlavatar.setOnClickListener(null)
552→            mySiteIconProgress.visibility = View.VISIBLE
553→            mySiteBlavatar.visibility = View.GONE
554→        }
555→        quickStartIconFocusPoint.setVisibleOrGone(siteInfoHeader.showIconFocusPoint)
556→        if (siteInfoHeader.onTitleClick != null) {
557→            siteInfoContainer.title.setOnClickListener { siteInfoHeader.onTitleClick.click() }
558→        } else {
559→            siteInfoContainer.title.setOnClickListener(null)
560→        }
561→        siteInfoContainer.title.text = siteInfoHeader.title
562→        quickStartTitleFocusPoint.setVisibleOrGone(siteInfoHeader.showTitleFocusPoint)
563→        quickStartSubTitleFocusPoint.setVisibleOrGone(siteInfoHeader.showSubtitleFocusPoint)
564→        siteInfoContainer.subtitle.text = siteInfoHeader.url
565→        siteInfoContainer.subtitle.setOnClickListener { siteInfoHeader.onUrlClick.click() }
566→        switchSite.setOnClickListener { siteInfoHeader.onSwitchSiteClick.click() }
567→        siteInfoCard.visibility = View.VISIBLE
568→    }
